race.comment: IN THAT MODE (1) is ticking along superbly now and lines up beautifully back to this level off a 39-day freshen. Drops back to a winning trip and has been kept up to the mark with a trial in between. Has to carry the big weight but draws the A1 and looks the one to beat. HARD LEAF (2) bounced back sharply here last time when scoring by a head over this trip. Drawn sticky but deserves following up. SUPREME THUNDER (8) finally got his reward for a string of strong runs here last time when driving hard down the outside to win. Can settle closer this time and looks another good chance. I AM RALPH (9) is building nicely and is open to further improvement fourth-up. Not dismissing.
